dialogue.line: I was expecting more, from the self-proclaimed next greatest thing in the city. How utterly disappointing.
It's not my fault you can't keep up gramps. Fine then? You want something real, something new and fresh!?
Then I'll give you something raw you can choke on.
Just like I plan to do your daughter later tonight.

line.format: I WILL TEAR YOUR FUCKING DICK OFF AND SHOVE IT SO FAR DOWN YOUR THROAT IT WILL RIP A HOLE THROUGH YOUR ASS!

dialogue.line: Oh please, your fragile brittle bones would snap like a twig before you could even lay a hand on me.
Now stop your stalling and start your singin'!
